creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Wed Apr 23 16:28:14 2014
New Revision: 351959
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351959
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351959/

Log:
  - Update to 5.00
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/WWW-Tumblr/Changes
  PR:		ports/188732 (based on)
  Submitted by:	TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun@onohara.to> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile
  head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo
  head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile	Wed Apr 23 16:07:13 2014	(r351958)
+++ head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile	Wed Apr 23 16:28:14 2014	(r351959)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	WWW-Tumblr
-PORTVERSION=	4.1
+PORTVERSION=	5.00
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -10,10 +10,15 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	markun@onohara.to
 COMMENT=	Perl interface for the Tumblr API
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
-RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-HTTP-Message>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTTP-Message \
+		p5-JSON>0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON \
+		p5-Moose>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
+		p5-Net-OAuth>0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-OAuth \
+		p5-libwww>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure

Modified: head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo	Wed Apr 23 16:07:13 2014	(r351958)
+++ head/www/p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo	Wed Apr 23 16:28:14 2014	(r351959)

+SHA256 (WWW-Tumblr-5.00.tar.gz) = bda422533a6b9e643e1be900f1acaaae0a10bcbefe79d61574f005cf9ffce0d8
+SIZE (WWW-Tumblr-5.00.tar.gz) = 230980

 %%SITE_PERL%%/WWW/Tumblr.pm

 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Tumblr/.packlist
 %%PERL5_MAN3%%/WWW::Tumblr.3.gz
-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Tumblr
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/WWW::Tumblr::Blog.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/WWW::Tumblr::ResponseError.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/WWW::Tumblr::Tagged.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/WWW::Tumblr::User.3.gz
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Tumblr
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW
-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%

+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/WWW/Tumblr
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/WWW
